content: Eduardo runs InsureTechABQ, DBA ABQ Growth Partners — an insurance tech business
Eduardo uses this assistant on his iMac and MacBook (both macOS)

Eduardo is also working on Moore Quality Air website — a family-owned HVAC + plumbing company in Albuquerque, NM. Live preview: https://eduardobudanauro-design.github.io/Moore-Quality-Air/. Phone: 505-221-6352. Owners: Jonathan McDaniel (founder 2013) and Anthony Hughes (partnered 2015). Outstanding: real photos needed, contact form needs Formspree ID, domain cutover pending.

Eduardo's voice and writing profile: AI educator, business growth coach, 30+ year insurance veteran. Writing style: facts first, build to the point, short sentences for impact, flowing paragraphs default. Core values: honor, integrity, truth, ethics. Motto: 'Edutainment — entertain, educate, equip. All three or it is not finished.' Never: punch down, fake stats, say AI makes money easy.
InsurePass is Eduardo's product to solve the insurance industry licensing barrier problem — the industry treats retention as a people problem but it is actually a licensing barrier problem.

Moore Quality Air services: HVAC (swamp cooler repair/install, swamp-to-refrigerated-air conversions = specialty, AC, gas furnaces, heat pumps, smart thermostats) + fixture plumbing (water heaters, faucets, toilets). Service area: Albuquerque, Rio Rancho, Corrales, Placitas ONLY. NO 24/7 service (Mon-Fri 8AM-5PM). Residential only.
